info.name: Movie Management System API
info.description: Complete API collection for Movie Management System with all endpoints and sample data

request.description: Save a new District location (requires existing parent province ID)
Save a new Sector location (requires existing parent district ID)
Get all top-level locations (parent is null)
Get districts under a province or sectors under a district
Filter locations by type: PROVINCE, DISTRICT, SECTOR
Search locations by name or code
Get all users in a specific location
Check if a director exists by first and last name
Save a movie with director and actors (requires existing IDs)
Search movies by title or genre
Get all movies by a specific director
Check if a movie exists by title
Save a new user with profile and location
Search users by username or email
Get all users with specific role: ADMIN, USER, MODERATOR
Get users by location hierarchy (walks up to 3 levels)
Get user profile by ID (profiles are created with users)
